query_normalized: predicting sleep stage transitions from scalp eeg using deep learning neuroscience
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same biological mechanism (sleep stage transitions/staging) using the same data modality (scalp/wearable EEG) and methodology (Deep Learning) as the user's question, even though it focuses on a real-time, single-channel implementation rather than the full transition dynamics. It serves as a canonical empirical baseline for deep learning approaches to sleep staging from EEG.
